name_cn:
POCHETTE MÉTIS Handbag #️⃣M44875
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to Chanel boutique specifications with dynamic chip technology. Features original factory materials and original light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic items).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure a 100% authentic feel. Includes original factory materials, hardware, edge painting, stitching, authentic craftsmanship, and the latest official website gift box.
25 x 19 x 7 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Metal
S-lock closure
Zippered exterior pocket
Interior pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Half-length: 48.0 cm
Adjustable up to: 55.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
Made in France
